answer:
The magnetic moment can be calculated using the formula \(\mu = \gamma \hbar I\), where \(\gamma = 1.569 \times 10^8 \, \text{T}^{-1}\text{s}^{-1}\), \(I = \frac{1}{2}\), and \(\hbar = 1.0546 \times 10^{-34} \, \text{J s}\). This gives \(\mu = 1.569 \times 10^8 \times 1.0546 \times 10^{-34} \times 0.5 \approx 0.827 \times 10^{-26} \, \text{J T}^{-1}\). Therefore, the correct answer is J.

\boxed{J}
